title: Speculation engine: speculative execution with overlay filesystem, prediction pipeline, and acceptance workflow for instant user interactions
description:
Speculation engine: speculative execution with overlay filesystem, prediction pipeline, and acceptance workflow for instant user interactions.

Phase 1 landed in commit <pending>; remaining work tracked in #990.

Phase 1 delivered (src/speculation/mod.rs, 698 lines):
- SpeculationEngine trait (Send + Sync + 'static, object-safe via Arc)
- 5 trait methods: predict, submit_result, has_pending, name, hit_rate
- NoOpSpeculationEngine: zero-cost constant-time default implementation
- SpeculationConfig with sane defaults (enabled=false, threshold=0.70, depth=6)
- build_engine factory
- build_hint_from_messages pure function
- after_turn integration hook
- PredictionId newtype, MessageSummary, SpeculationHint, SpeculationPrediction, ActualOutcome, PredictionOutcome types
- 23 tests covering trait contract, factory, hint construction, and edge cases
- Registered in lib.rs

Remaining phases tracked in #990.
